ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = [".jpg", ".png", ".gif", ".bmp", ".webp"]
ALLOWED_METHODS = ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]


def filter_valid_files(filenames: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    result = []
    for name in filenames:
        if name.endswith(".jpg") or name.endswith(".png") or name.endswith(".gif"):
            result.append(name)
    return result


def validate_request_methods(requests: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    valid = []
    for req in requests:
        if req["method"] in ALLOWED_METHODS:
            valid.append(req)
    return valid


def find_matching_users(users: list[dict], target_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    matches = []
    for user in users:
        if user["id"] in target_ids:
            matches.append(user)
    return matches


def process_batch(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    processed = []
    blocklist = ["spam", "junk", "trash", "garbage"]
    for item in items:
        if item not in blocklist:
            processed.append(item.upper())
    return processed
